meta.description: Campaign overworld definition for the Tangrene Liberation campaign. Defines sectors, their connections, and initial control levels.

overworld.name: Tangrene System
overworld.description: The Tangrene system, a remote cluster of settlements and Imperial installations on the Outer Rim. The liberation campaign spans three major sectors.

sectors.name: Docking District
sectors.description: The main spaceport and commercial hub. Smugglers, traders, and Imperial customs all operate here.

sectors.name: Market Quarter
sectors.description: A bustling bazaar district where information and contraband flow freely, if you know who to ask.

sectors.name: Industrial Zone
sectors.description: Factories and warehouses under heavy Imperial control. Workers toil under strict surveillance.

sectors.name: Old Town
sectors.description: The original settlement. Narrow streets and abandoned buildings provide cover for resistance operations.

sectors.name: Garrison Perimeter
sectors.description: The outer ring of the Imperial military compound. Heavy patrols and checkpoints.

sectors.name: Upper City
sectors.description: The wealthy district where Imperial officers and collaborators reside. Social influence is key here.

sectors.name: Command Sector
sectors.description: The heart of Imperial operations on Tangrene. The final objective lies here.
